headline: Rocky Shore Announces Ticker Symbol Change on OTC Markets to "RSGLF"
summary: TORONTO, ON / ACCESS Newswire / April 10, 2026 / Rocky Shore Gold Ltd. ("Rocky Shore" or the "Company") (CSE:RSG) announces that its common shares previously traded on the OTC Markets under the ticker symbol "CNOBF" will begin trading on the OTC Markets ...

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Republic Services, Raises Price Target to $245
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tami Zakaria   maintains Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $233 to $245.

raw.headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Republic Services, Raises Price Target to $245

headline: MRF upgrades from Republic, WM and Athens tout efficiency in fast-growing regions
summary: Companies continue centering building plans on newer, faster automation meant to process larger volumes with cleaner end products as state and local diversion laws get stricter.
